entry.title: New: RES24-249 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
TO REQUEST ADDITIONAL FUNDS FOR CONTRACT NO. SC-COR-2400089 TO CONTINUE THE SERVICES OF KOBAYASHI SUGITA & GODA, LLP, AS SPECIAL DEPUTY CORPORATION COUNSEL TO REPRESENT DEFENDANTS HONOLULU LIQUOR COMMISSION, JACOB FEARS, GLEN NISHIGATA AND CATHERINE FONTAINE IN THE LEGAL ACTION ENTITLED JHUMAR RAY WAITE V. HONOLULU LIQUOR COMMISSION, ET AL., CASE NO. CV23-00356 JAO/RT (USDC).

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
